tool.name: credential_validator
tool.description: Validate credentials across multiple protocols and services.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test SSH credentials - Validate SMB/Windows credentials - Test RDP access - Validate LDAP/AD credentials - Test database credentials - Bulk credential validation

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The validation action to perform: - validate_ssh: Test SSH credentials - validate_smb: Test SMB credentials - validate_rdp: Test RDP credentials - validate_ldap: Test LDAP/AD credentials - validate_ftp: Test FTP credentials - validate_mysql: Test MySQL credentials - validate_all: Test credentials against all protocols

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target host IP address or hostname

parameter.name: port
parameter.description: Custom port (uses protocol default if not specified)

returns.description: Validation results with access status and capabilities

tool.examples:
# Validate SSH credentials
validate_ssh 192.168.1.1 admin password123
# Validate SMB/Windows credentials
validate_smb dc01.domain.local administrator P@ssw0rd DOMAIN
# Test all protocols
validate_all 10.0.0.1 user pass
